channel.title: Better Rule Tiles
channel.description: Last 10 notes on Better Rule Tiles

item.title: Editor tools
item.description: The editor tools are the main way of creating and editing rule tiles using the package.

item.title: ★ BRT Editor
item.description: Getting started with the BRT Editor To use the BRT editor, you first need to create a better rule tile container.

item.title: Lock Selection
item.description: Lock selection With the lock selection tool you can lock an area to prevent it from accidentally being edited or deleted.

item.title: Changelog
item.description: Version 1.5.0-b5 Fixed broken Changelog file from v1.5.0-b4 Version 1.5.0-b4 Updated tooltips and names in the Editor Settings window Added a new Tile size option in the Editor Settings window, which lets you change the rendering size of all tiles on the grid without affecting the sprites.

item.title: Sprites
item.description: Sprites Sprites are an essential part of the tool. Every sprite placed on the grid on top of a Tile will create a Tiling rule in the exported tile.

item.title: Custom Properties
item.description: Custom properties Custom properties are a way to store information in your tiles, that you can later access at runtime using a script.

item.title: Tiling Rules
item.description: Tiling rules Tiling rules are what makes it possible for the rule tiles to work.

item.title: Cell Inspector
item.description: Grid cell inspector The Grid cell inspector is used to change properties of a specific grid cell.

item.title: Export Tiles
item.description: Exporting Tiles After you’ve created your Tiles and set up your Tiling rules, you can head to the Export options to export your tiles into tile assets you can use in the game.
